readMoreSmall: Capital O 45731 Hotel Seatree features modern and cozy rooms. The property offers a On-site restuara
moreTextHidden: nt , and a bicycle rental. The property is a short drive from the AU Engg college Playground, P & T Lotus Park, New P&T colony Park, and Walkers park. The beautiful  Ramakrishna Beach and Jodugulla Palem Beach are also a short drive from the property.  This location is perfect for a weekend getaway.

readMoreSmall: Capital O 82169 Vrisha Inn in Visakhapatnam offers comfy accommodations to discerning guests. Nearby
moreTextHidden: Vmrda Kailasagiri is 9 km away, while Vmrda Ins Kursura Submarine Museum is 12 km away from the hotel. This is a stunning hotel with a tonne of services for guests. The hotel offers both room service and an on-site restaurant. The hotel is located 2 kilometres from Rushikonda Beach and 7 kilometres from Tenneti Park.

readMoreSmall: Make your trip to Vizianagaram more comfortable with your stay at OYO 64666 Sai Nivas. The property
moreTextHidden: provides well-furnished and comfortable rooms with elegant and lavish decor. Guests can relax in the shared lounge after a hectic day. Try the palatable meals provided by the in-house restaurant. Don't miss out on the variety of drinks offered at the bar. No matter what your reasons are for visiting the city, OYO 64666 Sai Nivas will make you feel at home.

card-heading: 8. Super Hotel O Adarsh Nagar Near Kavya Hospital

readMoreSmall: The basic and cosy Sindhura Guest House in Visakhapatnam has rooms with plenty of space close to See
moreTextHidden: thammadhara. The traditional furnishings in each area of the house help visitors feel at home while they are there. The well-known Port Trust Diamond Jubilee Stadium is not far from the accommodation. Additionally, the hotel is conveniently in close proximity to banks, shops, a post office, various food joints and restaurants.
